g.text: Source columns: a, compound/dose_uM/response_pct; b, measured_pK/predicted_pK/group; c, biomarker/time_h/value; d, genotype/mouse/fraction_responding. Bands show 95% CI; error bars show SEM in c and SD in d; d tests are pairwise vs WT.
